process.name: Employee Onboarding
process.goal: New employee becomes active, trained, provisioned and ready to work without rework.

subprocesses.name: 1. Pre-Onboarding
tasks: Assign department, role, manager and start date
Upload signed contract and required documents
Send welcome email with next steps

subprocesses.name: 2. Access & Equipment Provisioning
tasks: Confirm employee can access required tools before Day 1

subprocesses.name: 3. Day 1 Onboarding
tasks: Explain tools, policies and internal processes
Confirm employee understands where to find tasks and support

subprocesses.name: 4. Training & Role Activation
tasks: Assign buddy or mentor if needed

risks: Employee has no access on Day 1
Laptop or equipment is not ready
HR closes onboarding without manager validation
